add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp from a PNG logo, setting its opacity and alignment, and adding it to the first page.

add-image-stamp-quality-opacity.title: Add Image Stamp with Quality and Opacity to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-quality-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting the stamp quality to 100 % and opacity to 0.8.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text to PDF Page 3
add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp with alternative text for accessibility to the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-image-stamp-background-floatingbox-p.title: Set Image Stamp as Background in FloatingBox on Page 4
set-image-stamp-background-floatingbox-p.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as the background of a FloatingBox and add it to the fourth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp, and add it to every page using a foreach loop.

rotate-image-stamp-add-to-pdf.title: Rotate Image Stamp and Add to PDF
rotate-image-stamp-add-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an image stamp, rotate it 45 degrees, center it, and add it to a page using Aspose.PDF.

align-image-stamp-top-right.title: Align Image Stamp to Top‑Right Corner with Margins
align-image-stamp-top-right.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF and position it in the top‑right corner using right and top margin offsets with Aspose.Pdf.

scale-image-stamp-full-page-width.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width While Preserving Aspect Ratio
scale-image-stamp-full-page-width.description: Loads a PDF, adds an image stamp to each page, sets the stamp width to the page width, and lets Aspose.Pdf automatically scale the height to maintain the original aspect ratio.

add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-large-pdf.title: Add Low‑Quality Image Stamp to Large PDF
add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-large-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp with reduced quality (10 %) to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, improving performance on large documents.

add-opaque-image-stamp-watermark.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Stamp Watermark to PDF
add-opaque-image-stamp-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to place a fully opaque image stamp at the center of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place a rotated image stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-upside-down-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF Page
add-upside-down-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it 180° to appear upside‑down, adding it to a page, and saving the modified document.

place-image-stamp-with-custom-coordinate.title: Place Image Stamp on PDF with Custom Coordinates
place-image-stamp-with-custom-coordinate.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF page at specific X and Y positions using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-image-stamp-percentage-offsets.title: Apply Image Stamp with Percentage Offsets
apply-image-stamp-percentage-offsets.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to each PDF page and positioning it using percentage‑based offsets relative to the page dimensions.

fit-image-stamp-within-rectangle.title: Fit Image Stamp Within a Rectangle
fit-image-stamp-within-rectangle.description: Shows how to place an image stamp so that it exactly fits a predefined rectangle on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a fixed-size image stamp at the center of every page in a PDF, independent of page dimensions.

add-image-stamp-unicode-alt-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alt Text to PDF
add-image-stamp-unicode-alt-text.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to each page of a PDF and set Unicode alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp with alternative text to each page of a PDF and converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypt it, apply an image stamp to each page, and save the stamped document.

add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF Without Invalidating Signature
add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an already digitally signed PDF, adding a semi‑transparent image stamp, and saving it incrementally so the existing signature remains valid.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Annotations
add-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp with opacity and alignment, adding it to a page, and saving the document while keeping existing annotations intact.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-form.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF Form While Preserving Fields
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image stamp on each page of a PDF that contains form fields using Aspose.Pdf, while keeping the fields interactive.

add-image-stamp-and-flatten-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
add-image-stamp-and-flatten-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF and then flatten all annotations so the resulting document becomes read‑only.

add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Bookmarks
add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to overlay an image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, keeping existing bookmarks and the document outline unchanged.

add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Page Labels
add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf without affecting existing page labels.

add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.title: Add Image Stamp and Preserve XMP Metadata in PDF
add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent image stamp to each page of a PDF while preserving the original XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Embedded Files
add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping any embedded files intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving JavaScript
add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent image stamp on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, while keeping any existing JavaScript actions intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving AcroForm Fields
add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping existing AcroForm fields unchanged.

add-custom-blue-text-stamp-to-first-page.title: Add Custom Blue Text Stamp to First PDF Page
add-custom-blue-text-stamp-to-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Auto-Adjusting Text Stamp to PDF
add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on each PDF page that automatically scales its font size to fit a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

add-outlined-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-outlined-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a text stamp rendered with stroke mode to produce outlined text and apply it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp with fill‑stroke rendering to produce bold outlined text and adding it to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

align-text-stamp-bottom-left.title: Align Text Stamp to Bottom‑Left with Margin
align-text-stamp-bottom-left.description: Shows how to add a text stamp to every page of a PDF and position it at the bottom‑left corner with a 10‑point margin using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-text-stamp-slanted-watermark.title: Rotate Text Stamp for Slanted PDF Watermark
rotate-text-stamp-slanted-watermark.description: Shows how to add a semi‑transparent text stamp rotated 30 degrees to every page of a PDF, creating a slanted watermark effect with Aspose.Pdf.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Opacity to PDF
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent 'CONFIDENTIAL' text stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-with-background-box.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box to PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-with-background-box.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text stamp with a colored background box behind the content of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line text stamp with custom line spacing to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Right-to-Left Text Stamp to PDF
add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, sets its language to Arabic, creates a TextStamp with Arabic text using Unicode RTL marks, places the stamp centered at the bottom of each page, and saves the result.

add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image across every page of a PDF as a background watermark using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent, 45° rotated text stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-background-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place an image stamp behind the existing content of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-faint-text-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Faint Text Overlay to PDF Pages
add-faint-text-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent 'CONFIDENTIAL' text stamp as a faint overlay on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-page-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Page Stamp to PDF Pages
add-rotated-page-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a page stamp rotated 90 degrees to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-sized-page-stamp.title: Add Custom-Sized Page Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-custom-sized-page-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a PdfPageStamp with custom width, height, and position, then applying it to a chosen page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates applying a PdfPageStamp to pages 5 through 10 of a PDF, with opacity and background settings, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-global-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Global Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-global-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a TextStamp and apply it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's Document and Page.AddStamp methods.

create-page-stamp-from-template.title: Create PDF Page Stamp from Template Page
create-page-stamp-from-template.description: Shows how to take a page from one PDF and use it as a stamp applied to every page of another PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.title: Apply PDF Page as Background Stamp
apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.description: Shows how to use a page from one PDF as a background stamp on every page of another PDF with Aspose.Pdf.
